metadata.title: County Property Tax Rates and Veteran Exemptions — PA
metadata.description: County-level property tax rates, veteran exemption implementation details, and application information for high-veteran-population counties in Pennsylvania.
sources: Pennsylvania Department of Community and Economic Development
PA DMVA Disabled Veterans' Real Estate Tax Exemption

notes.tax_rate_format: Effective rate per $100 of assessed value.
notes.assessment_note: Pennsylvania counties assess at varying percentages of market value. Rates shown are effective rates applied to market value.
notes.veteran_exemption_note: PA Act 77 (2021): Full property tax exemption for 100% P&T veterans who demonstrate financial need. Presumptive income threshold $114,637 (2025). Locally administered through county assessment offices.
notes.update_cycle: Tax rates set annually by county, school district, and municipal authorities.

property_tax.notes: Philadelphia's effective rate is lower than surrounding suburbs. Uniform treatment under Act 60 assessment.

disabled_veteran_100_pct.eligibility: 100% P&T service-connected disability; financial need (income ≤$114,637 presumptive threshold, 2025); PA resident
disabled_veteran_100_pct.savings_basis: Philadelphia County median home $280,000 × 1.40% effective rate
disabled_veteran_100_pct.note: Full exemption under PA Act 77 (2021). Apply through Philadelphia OPA. Income-tested: presumptive need level $114,637 for 2025 — verify current threshold at PA DMVA before applying.

documentation: VA Summary of Benefits Letter or Rating Decision

property_tax.notes: Allegheny County (Pittsburgh area). Countywide reassessment in 2012; values held since then.

disabled_veteran_100_pct.eligibility: 100% P&T service-connected disability; financial need (income ≤$114,637 presumptive threshold, 2025); PA resident
disabled_veteran_100_pct.savings_basis: Allegheny County median home $220,000 × 1.39% effective rate
disabled_veteran_100_pct.note: Full exemption under PA Act 77 (2021). Income-tested at county assessment office.

application.office: Allegheny County Office of Property Assessments

property_tax.notes: Cumberland County (Carlisle/Mechanicsburg area). High veteran population due to Carlisle Barracks.

disabled_veteran_100_pct.eligibility: 100% P&T service-connected disability; financial need (income ≤$114,637 presumptive threshold, 2025); PA resident
disabled_veteran_100_pct.savings_basis: Cumberland County median home $295,000 × 1.15% effective rate
disabled_veteran_100_pct.note: Full exemption under PA Act 77 (2021). Carlisle Barracks retiree community makes this a high-priority county.

property_tax.notes: York County, south-central PA. Large veteran population.

disabled_veteran_100_pct.eligibility: 100% P&T service-connected disability; financial need (income ≤$114,637 presumptive threshold, 2025); PA resident
disabled_veteran_100_pct.savings_basis: York County median home $250,000 × 1.30% effective rate
disabled_veteran_100_pct.note: Full exemption under PA Act 77 (2021). Apply through York County Assessment Office.
